scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.setup: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db seed --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.start:local: npm run setup && npm run dev
scripts.start:single: npm run build && npm start -w server
